data.description: Samsung Electro-Mechanics… it’s up 70% in just one month. Did you hear me? Anon? Samsung Electro-Mechanics is the only company that can benefit from both the ABF substrate supercycle and the MLCC supercycle.

data.title: VanEck identifies semiconductor stocks crucial for AI infrastructure in 2026, signaling a shift in investment focus.
data.description: VanEck, an asset manager, has identified semiconductor companies as crucial investment prospects in the realm of AI, as the sector transitions from testing to building essential infrastructure. This shift signifies a significant growth potential for investors looking into this sector. The semiconductor industry is a key player in the development and advancement of AI technology, with a focus on creating the necessary framework to support AI innovations. This shift is indicative of the increasing reliance on AI in various industries, driving the need for robust infrastructure. Investors are advised to consider the promising prospects offered by semiconductor companies in this evolving landscape, with notable developments and opportunities emerging as the industry progresses.

data.title: SmallRig Spotlights Comprehensive Creative Ecosystem for DJI Osmo Pocket 4, RF 20C Light, and TRIBEX Monopod at NAB 2026
data.description: During the NAB Show 2026 in Las Vegas, SmallRig is showcasing three noteworthy products: the Ultimate Creative Ecosystem designed for DJI Osmo Pocket 4, the RF 20C LED Light, and the TRIBEX Monopod. The Ultimate Creative Ecosystem for DJI Osmo Pocket 4 features magnetic elements and is aimed at enhancing creativity in content creation. The RF 20C LED Light offers advanced lighting solutions, while the TRIBEX Monopod provides stability and versatility for various shooting scenarios. These products are among the highlights at the event, offering innovative tools for professionals in the industry.

data.title: Matsui Securities Adopts Broadridge's JASDECPS on SaaS Platform, Transforming Securities Lending Business for Accelerated Growth
data.description: Matsui Securities Co., Ltd. has opted for Broadridge's Software as a Service (SaaS) to enhance operations and adapt to Japan's evolving market landscape. The company aims to boost efficiency by utilizing the JASDEC Processing Solution. This move comes as a strategic initiative towards streamlining securities lending operations. The development was announced in Tokyo on April 20, 2026.

data.title: Relativity to Establish Singapore Entity, Expanding APAC Footprint
data.description: In the upcoming fourth quarter, Relativity intends to form a new entity in Singapore as part of its strategy to strengthen its operations in Asia through local recruitment. The popularity of RelativityOne and Relativity aiR is on the rise among customers in the Asia-Pacific region, with a noticeable increase in the use of these tools to manage the growing volume of data and legal matters. data.title: Broadridge Schedules Webcast and Conference Call to Review Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Broadridge Financial Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: BR) has announced that it will unveil its financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026 on Thursday, April 30, 2026. A webcast and conference call to review these results are set to take place at 8:30 AM on the same day.
